rules.desc: Mechanical plausibility — joints articulate, engines have intake/exhaust, moving parts have clearance
rules.rationale_pass: Mechanical logic holds — joints, engines, and moving parts are plausible (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Mechanical logic broken — impossible joints, sealed engines, or non-functional moving parts (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Proportion consistency — same vehicle reads at the same scale and mass across all views
rules.rationale_pass: Proportions are consistent — vehicle reads at correct scale and mass across views (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Proportions drift between views — vehicle reads as different size or mass (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Surface detail density — panel lines, rivets, wear marks at scale-appropriate density
rules.rationale_pass: Surface detail is at appropriate density — panel lines and hardware read at scale (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Surface detail wrong — too sparse, too noisy, or inconsistent density for scale (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Silhouette readability — vehicle class identifiable from silhouette alone at distance
rules.rationale_pass: Silhouette reads clearly — vehicle class identifiable at distance (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Silhouette is generic or ambiguous — vehicle class not identifiable at distance (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Scale reference — cockpit, hatches, or crew figures imply correct crew scale
rules.rationale_pass: Scale reads correctly — cockpit and access points imply correct crew size (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Scale is ambiguous or wrong — no crew reference or hatches imply impossible crew size (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Functional design language — purpose reads from form (transport vs combat vs utility)
rules.rationale_pass: Function reads from form — vehicle purpose is clear from design language (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Function is unreadable — form does not communicate purpose (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Access points visible — hatches, ladders, maintenance panels, boarding points
rules.rationale_pass: Access points present and logical — hatches, ladders, and panels are placed correctly (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Access points missing or illogical — crew cannot board, maintain, or operate this vehicle (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Wear pattern follows use — high-traffic areas show more damage, sheltered areas less
rules.rationale_pass: Wear pattern is use-driven — high-traffic and exposed areas show appropriate wear (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Wear pattern is random — damage does not follow usage or exposure logic (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Style consistency within vehicle class or faction — shared design DNA across the lineup
rules.rationale_pass: Style is consistent — vehicle shares design DNA with its class or faction (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Style breaks from class or faction — design language does not match lineup (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Damage reads as battle history — scars, repairs, and patches tell a story, not random destruction
rules.rationale_pass: Damage reads as battle history — scars and repairs tell a coherent story (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Damage is random destruction — no narrative, just noise (${scorePct}%)
